creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
From the build log I see you are building within /usr/obj/usr/ports. I expect you are seeing a conflict between base and newly built system binaries. 

Is this x86? cross compiling?
New system svn revision? Base sys rev?

Do you normally test build ports this way?
Does it work if you build in the base system /usr/ports?
